arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Kinesis stream.

closed_shards.description: A set of shard IDs that have been closed in the Kinesis stream.

creation_timestamp.description: The timestamp, in Unix epoch time, when the Kinesis stream was created.

encryption_type.description: The encryption type used on the Kinesis stream, e.g., NONE or KMS.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Kinesis stream.

kms_key_id.description: The AWS Key Management Service (KMS) key ID used for encryption.

open_shards.description: A set of shard IDs that are currently open in the Kinesis stream.

retention_period.description: The number of hours data records are retained in the Kinesis stream.

shard_level_metrics.description: A set of shard-level metrics that are enabled for the Kinesis stream.

status.description: The current status of the Kinesis stream, e.g., ACTIVE or CREATING.

stream_mode_details.description: Details about the mode of the Kinesis stream, such as on-demand or provisioned.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the Kinesis stream.
